steps.ingestDescription: Process your data and view analysis

workflow.title: Welcome to the Data Connection Wizard
workflow.description: Let’s connect your data. Select your preferred connection method.

connect.title: Database Connection
connect.description: Connect directly to MySQL, PostgreSQL, MS SQL, Oracle, SQLite, SAP HANA, or other supported databases. Setup: 10–15 mins

upload.title: CSV Upload
upload.description: Upload one or more CSVs to create a new data source quickly. Setup: 1–3 mins

upload.title: Upload your dataset
upload.description: We get your file ready behind the scenes. We fix encoding, pick the right delimiter, and tidy column names so you can dive in without extra work. This prep usually takes one to three minutes, so thanks for your patience! 😊
upload.stepperDescription: Upload and preview your CSV; the data source is created in the next step

dropzone.title: Add your CSV file
dropzone.description: Drag your CSV here or click to pick it from your computer.

preview.title: Preview your table
preview.showing: Showing the first {{shown, number}} of {{total, number}} rows

analysis.title: Automatic insights
analysis.placeholder: Data profiling will appear here soon
analysis.description: Feel free to continue while we process your data

processing.uploadingToServer: Sending your file to our servers...
processing.profileReady: All done! Redirecting to your data profile...
processing.profileFailed: Data analysis couldn't complete, but your data source is ready!

tasks.process_and_load_file: Reviewing your CSV so it's ready to use
tasks.create_table: Setting up a place for your data
tasks.insert_data: Moving your data into the workspace
tasks.analyze_schema: Getting to know your data's structure
tasks.update_metadata: Updating what we know about this data source
tasks.fetching_data_source_details: Finishing up your data source setup
tasks.refreshing_data_sources: Getting your data source ready to use
tasks.finalize_status: Putting the finishing touches on your data

validation.invalidFile: We couldn't read that file. Make sure you're uploading a CSV.
validation.fileTooLarge: This file is over 20MB. Try splitting it into smaller pieces and upload again.
validation.emptyFile: It looks like the file is empty. Pick a CSV that has some data.
validation.tooManyColumns: This CSV has more than {{limit}} columns. Remove extra columns and try again.
validation.tooManyRows: This CSV has more than {{limit}} rows. Trim the rows or split the file, then upload again.
validation.parseError: We had trouble reading the CSV format. Fix any formatting issues and try again.
validation.parseFailed: We couldn't finish reading the CSV. Double-check the file and upload it once more.
validation.ingestionFailed: We couldn't finish adding your data. Try again in a moment or reach out for help.
validation.pipelineFailed: Something went wrong setting up the data source. Try again, and contact support if it keeps happening.

configuration.title: Database Configuration
configuration.description: Enter your data source connection details

setup.title: Setup Progress
setup.description: Setting up your data source connection

complete.title: Setup Complete
complete.description: Your data source connection is ready to use

enterpriseDialog.title: Enterprise Feature
enterpriseDialog.description: Database connections are only available for enterprise users. Schedule a call with our team to learn more about upgrading your plan.

configErrors.fetchFailed: Failed to fetch database configuration. Please try again.
